name: Meloetta

forms.name: Lament
forms.pokedexDescription: A legend tells the tale of two sisters. They sang and danced a joyous song. Until one day, the younger sister discovered a strange cacoon. The elder sister warned her not to go near, but the younger sister did not listen... The beast within the cacoon was awakened and laid waste to the valley. The elder sister tried to stop it, but to no avail. The beast took the elder sisters eyes, and in the end, nothing was left but ash and decay. Legends say that the younger sister never forgave herself. She dawned a mask as a reminder of the tragedy she caused, and hid herself from the world.

forms.name: Soprano
forms.pokedexDescription: Because it is blind, this Pokémon is not afraid of the dark. It lives deep below in the Ancient Cities that remind it of its home. Its soft soprano voice echoes through the caves as it sings and plays its violin, filling the silence with an eerie yet beautiful song. Legends say its music can calm restless spirits.

forms.name: Acoustic
forms.pokedexDescription: Meloetta has been empowered by lively spirits roused by its song, blessing it with electric energy. Its mood has brightened, filling it with furvor. Though its still blind, the power of its ancestors has heightened its senses. Because of this, it has removed the bandages covering its eyes, using it to tie its hair in a ponytail.

pokedexDescription: Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it.
